zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray於1285年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Thomas Randolph11282歲，母親Isabel Martha Kilconquhar27歲。他於1310年與Isabella Stewart在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年7月20日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安姆瑟爾包享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray于1285年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Thomas Randolph11282岁，母亲Isabel Martha Kilconquhar27岁。他于1310年与Isabella Stewart在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年7月20日在苏格兰米德洛迪安姆瑟爾包享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Randolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Randerson
meanings: English (West and East Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Randolf (see Randolph ) + -son. In East Anglia the name may also have been influenced by a form of the now rare or extinct Rendlesham, itself from the place of that name in Suffolk. The placename probably derives from an Old English personal name Rendel (genitive Rendeles) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

variants.name: Randolf
meanings: English and German: variant of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray was born in 1285, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Randolph, was 11282 and his mother, Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, was 27. He married Isabella Stewart in 1310, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 July 1332, in Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 47, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray est né en 1285, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Randolph, avait 11282 ans et sa mère, Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Stewart en 1310, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1332, à Musselburgh, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray 1285 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Randolph 11282 und seine Mutter Isabel Martha Kilconquhar 27. Er hat 1310 in Scotland Isabella Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1332 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray è nato il nel 1285 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Randolph, aveva 11282 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Stewart nel 1310, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1332, nel Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Morayが1285年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Randolphは11282歳，母Isabel Martha Kilconquharは27歳であった。1310年にスコットランドでIsabella Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年7月20日にスコットランドミドロスアンムセルブルグで47歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray(이)가 1285년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Randolph(은)는 11282세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Martha Kilconquhar(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1310년 스컷랜드에서 Isabella Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 7월 20일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 무셀버그에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray nasceu em 1285, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Randolph, tinha 11282 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Stewart em 1310, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1332, em Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray родился в 1285 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Randolph было 11282 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Stewart в 1310 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1332 г. в местности мусселбург, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Randolph 1st Earl of Moray nació en 1285, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Thomas Randolph, tenía 11282 años y su mamá, Isabel Martha Kilconquhar, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Isabella Stewart en 1310, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1332, en Musselburgh, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
